creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
A point release to close a code execution vulnerability.  This bug
allows a remote user logged in to the phpmyadmin web application to
run arbitrary shell commands with the credentials of the web
server. Not much more information is available yet:

phpMyAdmin release notes:
   https://sourceforge.net/project/shownotes.php?release_id=626450
   http://www.phpmyadmin.net/home_page/downloads.php?relnotes=1

Security Advisory:
   http://www.phpmyadmin.net/home_page/security.php?issue=PMASA-2008-7

Other Links:
   http://fd.the-wildcat.de/pma_e36a091q11.php
